untranslatable_reason: Diamond pattern geometry (equal highs at top AND equal lows at bottom with contracting/expanding structure) cannot be directly expressed with available indicators. Pattern detection requires multi-bar analysis of swing point symmetry and width ratios. Provided entry uses proxy conditions: price near lows (oversold reversal), narrow bandwidth (pattern compression), and bull market context (price above MA50). Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT suggest no specific mechanical exit rule defined.
